programme.title: Grand Crew
programme.desc: The crew all do their best to cope after a bad news cycle. And there's wine.

programme.title: It's Academic
programme.desc: Simon Reeve hosts the educational and entertaining show, where schools compete to win cash and prizes.

programme.title: It's Academic
programme.desc: Simon Reeve hosts the educational and entertaining show, where schools compete to win cash and prizes.

programme.title: It's Academic
programme.desc: Simon Reeve hosts the educational and entertaining show, where schools compete to win cash and prizes.

programme.title: Get Clever
programme.desc: An outrageous series where adventure, fun and the wonders of science are burst wide open.

programme.title: Get Clever
programme.desc: An outrageous series where adventure, fun and the wonders of science are burst wide open.

programme.title: Flushed
programme.desc: A game show for kids. Two teams battle it out to determine who wins the prize and who ends up covered in purple sludge.

programme.title: Home Shopping
programme.desc: Shopping program.

programme.title: Home Shopping
programme.desc: Shopping program.

programme.title: The Great Day Out
programme.desc: Jillian discovers hidden treasures just over the border. Jamie Durie shows his artistic side, while radio announcer Bianca Dye shares her great day out.

programme.title: Farmer Wants a Wife
programme.desc: The tables are turned and it's up to our Ladies to plan dates for their Farmers, but the Farmers don't know which Lady has proposed which date. When the dates return home - 2 Ladies leave the farms!

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: For the first time ever, teams travel to Bulgaria where they face a surprise double U-Turn.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams continue traveling through Bulgaria where the Express Pass is up for grabs, and one team makes a critical mistake that could jeopardize their race.

programme.title: Extended Family
programme.desc: When Trey's high profile gets him out of a speeding ticket, Julia and Jim worry about the message it sends to their children, causing Trey to try and get another ticket on purpose.

programme.title: Grand Crew
programme.desc: Wyatt gets into an art show and asks Sherm to be his subject. Noah doesn't know if Simone is ready to take the next step, but Nicky has a plan. Fay teaches Anthony some dance moves. And there's wine.

programme.title: Lopez Vs. Lopez
programme.desc: Mayan and Quinten have mixed feelings when Rosie finally dates a nice guy who also happens to be Quinten's boss. George must face his painful past in order to recover Mayan's childhood home videos.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.sub-title: When Sisters Collide & The Return Of The Grifters
programme.desc: Darlene urges Ben to make some male friends as he feels anxious about turning 50; Mark asks Harris to buy him and his friends beer for their dorm room.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.sub-title: Hanging in Dorms with Boys & The Secret Life of Men
programme.desc: The hardware store experiences a smash-and-grab, and Dan and Jackie nab one of the culprits; Beverly Rose learns a lesson in remembering loved ones who have passed while keeping their memories alive.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: A bizarre looking baby cockatoo has fallen twenty metres out of her nest and wants to alert the whole world to her plight. Can Chris help the little screamer? And will she ever be able to fly?

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Dr Chris fights to save one of the clinic's favourite patients, Bluebell, who was dumped on the doorstep of the clinic as a kitten. And has returned as a victim of a hit-and-run accident.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: Welcome to the courtroom of Judge Judith Sheindlin. The cases are real, the people are real, and the rulings are final.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: Welcome to the courtroom of Judge Judith Sheindlin. The cases are real, the people are real, and the rulings are final.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay visits failing restaurants across the USA in an attempt to revive their businesses. He and his team access the damage and help the owners get back into business.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay visits failing restaurants across the USA in an attempt to revive their businesses. He and his team access the damage and help the owners get back into business.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay steps in to transform a family-run Haitian juice bar and restaurant in Brooklyn, New York.

programme.title: First Dates UK
programme.desc: Cake maker Fiona is a self-confessed 'princess' while Jessica loves lager and football and doesn't want to change. How do they get along on their first dates with Rakim and Ryan?

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.desc: A petty officer is murdered during Mardi Gras festivities, and Pride contemplates what to tell his daughter about his strained relationship with his father.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.desc: After a Navy recruiter is the target of a lethal hit-and-run, the NCIS team investigates whether the murder was tied to her career or to her role as a foster mother.

programme.title: The Rising
programme.desc: Discovering her killer, Neve must gain Alex's trust to secure an arrest; their love is stronger than ever, but in her pursuit for justice she realizes there is an even darker force that haunts her.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay visits failing restaurants across the USA in an attempt to revive their businesses. He and his team access the damage and help the owners get back into business.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay visits failing restaurants across the USA in an attempt to revive their businesses. He and his team access the damage and help the owners get back into business.

programme.title: Jordie, Sam & Ted's Adventures
programme.desc: Sam, Jordie and young Ted are travelling in their Coromal Caravan through Queensland. This week they discover Hervey Bay and the best things this area has to offer.

programme.title: Jordie, Sam & Ted's Adventures
programme.desc: Sam, Jordie and their son Ted park up their van for an adventure to Great Keppel Island.

programme.title: The Girl in the Woods
programme.desc: A horrifying discovery deep in the mine could lead to dire consequences for West Pine; Nolan reveals a secret; the teens' investigation leads to drunken, music-filled mayhem in the woods.

programme.title: It's Academic
programme.desc: Simon Reeve hosts the educational and entertaining show, where schools compete to win cash and prizes.

programme.title: It's Academic
programme.desc: Simon Reeve hosts the educational and entertaining show, where schools compete to win cash and prizes.

programme.desc: A game show for kids. Two teams battle it out to determine who wins the prize and who ends up covered in purple sludge.

programme.title: Home Shopping
programme.desc: Shopping program.

programme.title: Home Shopping
programme.desc: Shopping program.

programme.title: The Great Day Out
programme.desc: School holidays are just around the corner and the team have ideas to keep the kids active, healthy and entertained.

programme.title: Farmer Wants a Wife
programme.desc: The farmers meet two new ladies and choose one for a romantic date. Then at the Country Fair, the new arrivals rock romantic foundations, triggering an ultimatum.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams travel to Naples, Italy, where they must perfect their pizza-making skills.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.sub-title: Up the River Without a Joust
programme.desc: Racers travel to Strasbourg, France, where they go head-to-head in a water jousting match.

programme.title: Bringing Sexy Back
programme.desc: Ned the loveable truck driver wants to get back to his sexy self and propose to the love of his life Becky. After gaining 70kg in two years, Ned lost his dream job and hit rock bottom. As he begins to turn his life around, family and friends will be overwhelmed by an unbelievable transformation and a romantic marriage proposal.

programme.title: First Dates UK
programme.desc: Cake maker Fiona is a self-confessed 'princess' while Jessica loves lager and football and doesn't want to change. How do they get along on their first dates with Rakim and Ryan?

programme.title: Australia's Got Talent
programme.desc: A former Bachelorette star channels Channing Tatum; an adrenaline-pumping display of acrobatics; and a freestyle skydiving champ takes flight.

programme.title: Beethoven's 2nd
programme.desc: Beethoven, the St. Bernard dog, becomes a father, but his girlfriend Missy is dognapped, and his puppies are in danger of the same fate.

programme.title: Fifty Shades Freed
programme.desc: Anastasia and Christian get married, but Jack Hyde continues to threaten their relationship.

programme.title: Jojo Rabbit
programme.desc: A young German boy in the Hitler Youth whose hero and imaginary friend is the country's dictator is shocked to discover that his mother is hiding a Jewish girl in their home.

programme.title: Grand Crew
programme.desc: The fellas attend a party hosted by Anthony and Sherm's neighbour. Nicky's relationship is put to the test. Fay jumps back into the dating scene. And there's wine.

programme.title: Grand Crew
programme.desc: The crew takes a trip to Ojai. And there's wine.

programme.title: Home Shopping
programme.desc: Shopping program.

programme.title: Home Shopping
programme.desc: Shopping program.

programme.title: Secrets and Lies
programme.desc: Ben seeks information that could prove Cornell is pushing the boundaries of the law.

programme.title: Secrets and Lies
programme.desc: Feeling desperate, Ben retraces his steps from the night of Tom's murder.

programme.title: Secrets and Lies
programme.desc: Ben's discovery adds to the tension between he and Christy, while Cornell returns to the crime scene.
